channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A white double mattress dumped at Nazeby Court again, 7th April
item.description:
Outside the building near the back entrance hidden away... it's been there for at least 2 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cromwell Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus Schedule display incomplete, 6th April
item.description:
According to their timetables, there's a no 10 bus due to leave stop no 4 on the Promenade at 7:21 on weekday evenings. However, at least on Thursdays, it doesn't appear on the electronic display on that shelter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Promenade, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor tarmac condition all the way along the school, 6th April
item.description:
Between the school.drop off and pick up. Long shallow potholes all the way along the stretch of road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farm Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole and getting larger on mellville road opposite number 69, 6th April
item.description:
Road opposite number 69
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61,63, Melville Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping along lane, 6th April
item.description:
The storm has blown a lot of the fly tip along the lane. Incontinence pads are included in this fly tip so may need extra care with clear up.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frog Furlong Lane, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crossing not working, 6th April
item.description:
On the Lidl side it doesn't light up until someone on the other side pushes theirs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint George's Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes when you turn into Folland Avenue from Hucclecote Rd, 6th April
item.description:
Multiple potholes on the entry lane when you turn into Folland Avenue from Hucclecote Rd. These potholes have been there for at least 10 years and have been POORLY repaired, so they have reapearred shortly afterwards. Please do a proper repair job so that this issue won't need to be raised again. The number of potholes and their sizes are really damaging the cars using this road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Folland Avenue, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Billbrook Road, 6th April
item.description:
Been parked up for over a year, MOT ran out Jan 2026 and Tax April 2026. Is parked awkwardly so makes access to Billbrook Rd difficult if coming in from Green Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Billbrook Road, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box of car parts dumped, 6th April
item.description:
There is a cardboard box with a load of other boxes inside with what looks like car parts.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4079, Oxenton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Table and mattress dumped, 6th April
item.description:
A table and a mattress have been dumped at the side of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickfield Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti on bus shelter glass panels (bauer media), 6th April
item.description:
Gloucester Road westbound bus shelter opposite junction with Tennyson Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed limit sign leaning 13 degrees, 6th April
item.description:
A40 at Whithington turning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whittington Court Lane, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Road markings work or faded, making this bend and junction ‘interesting’ after dark, 6th April
item.description:
A40 junction to Whittington

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Central ,road markings are worn, 6th April
item.description:
Outside Dunkertons
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: The central road markings are worn in this area, 6th April
item.description:
East end of Dowdeswell Reservoir
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Public rubbish bin with contents thrown into stream, 6th April
item.description:
Public rubbish bin by the bridge on Robert burn’s avenue has been thrown over the bridge and into the stream. This time the inner bin and the contents have been thrown over the bridge and the bin contents are polluting the stream.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Robert Burns Avenue, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path not re-instated, 5th April
item.description:
Difficult to navigate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Brockhampton Road, Sudeley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path not re-instated, 5th April
item.description:
No sign of path and difficult to navigate. Met two from opposite direction and crossed 20 m apart.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Brockhampton Road, Sudeley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bank eroded in front of stile, 5th April
item.description:
The stream bank has fallen in and walkers have to step very close to the edge. FG is padlocked so no access through adjacent FG.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Brockhampton Road, Sudeley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: KG has trip hazards, 5th April
item.description:
KG eroded and large stones are protruding
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Brockhampton Road, Sudeley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
